title: potentilla subalpina
intro: Potentilla subalpina, also known as the Subalpine Cinquefoil, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Rosaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported health benefits and is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Potentilla subalpina include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatic pain, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Potentilla subalpina can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
